engineIntelligence.h2: Renault Kadjar Engines - Codes, Common Failures & Replacement Costs
engineIntelligence.description: The cards below cover the main engines fitted to the Renault Kadjar in the UK, including documented failure causes, variant production years, and typical rebuilt engine costs based on current UK market data.

cards.altText: Renault Kadjar K9K engine - diesel 1.5L replacement UK
knownFailures: EGR valve clogging - causes power loss and rough idle on high-mileage diesel units.
DPF regeneration failure - common on short-journey cars exceeding 80k miles.
Turbo actuator wear - leads to boost loss and reduced performance on later models.

cards.altText: Renault Kadjar R9M engine - diesel 1.6L replacement UK
knownFailures: Twin-turbo actuator failure - causes uneven boost and power loss on high-output variants.
EGR cooler degradation - leads to coolant leaks and overheating on post-2016 units.
Flexplate wear on EDC models - results in transmission judder and noisy operation.

cards.altText: Renault Kadjar H5F engine - petrol 1.2L replacement UK
knownFailures: Timing chain stretch - documented on pre-2018 units, causes rattling and misfires from 60k miles.
Excessive oil consumption - indicates piston ring or valve seal wear on higher-mileage examples.
Turbo wastegate sticking - leads to boost inconsistency and reduced performance.

commonProblems.h2: Renault Kadjar Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Renault Kadjar's K9K 1.5 dCi, R9M 1.6 dCi and H5F/H5Ht TCe engines dominate UK replacement enquiries. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address original failure points - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Use this section to decide between repair and replacement.

problems.h4: Timing Chain Failure - Why Renault Kadjar 1.2 TCe Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: Renault Kadjar Play, Iconic 1.2 TCe (2015-2018, H5F400)
problems.rootCause: Early H5F timing chain tensioners wear prematurely, allowing chain stretch that causes rattling, misfires and potential valve damage.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace chain, tensioner, guides before catastrophic failure
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught early; not suitable if engine already rattles

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt H5F with upgraded tensioner kit, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for engines with confirmed chain damage; eliminates recurrence risk

problems.recommendation: If your Kadjar 1.2 TCe is rattling on cold start or showing misfire codes, a rebuilt engine with upgraded timing components is more cost-effective than attempting a chain-only repair on a high-mileage unit. For preventative maintenance under 60k miles, a chain kit from a specialist offers good value.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt H5F engine prices for your Renault Kadjar

problems.h4: EGR/DPF Clogging - Why Renault Kadjar Diesel Engines Lose Power
problems.affectedModels: Renault Kadjar Play, Iconic, GT-Line 1.5/1.6 dCi (2015-2022, K9K/R9M)
problems.rootCause: Short-journey driving prevents DPF regeneration; EGR valves clog with carbon, restricting airflow and triggering limp mode.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Clean or replace EGR valve, reset adaptations, road test
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix; DPF may still fail if driving pattern unchanged

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Professional DPF clean or replacement, regeneration reset
repairOptions.longevity: Effective if engine otherwise healthy; does not address EGR root cause

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt K9K/R9M with tested EGR/DPF, upgraded components, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best long-term solution for high-mileage diesels with multiple emissions faults

problems.recommendation: For Kadjars over 80k miles with both EGR and DPF faults, a rebuilt diesel engine with updated emissions hardware is often more economical than sequential repairs. For isolated EGR issues under 70k miles, specialist cleaning offers good value.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Renault Kadjar K9K diesel replacement engines

problems.h4: Turbo Actuator Failure - Why Renault Kadjar Engines Lose Boost
problems.affectedModels: Renault Kadjar GT-Line, Premier Edition 1.3 TCe/1.6 dCi (2016-2022, H5Ht/R9M)
problems.rootCause: Turbo wastegate actuators wear or stick, causing inconsistent boost, reduced power and potential over/under-boost fault codes.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace faulty actuator, calibrate wastegate, road test
repairOptions.longevity: Effective if turbo core is healthy; does not address internal turbo wear

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt H5Ht/R9M with tested or upgraded turbo assembly, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for high-mileage performance variants with multiple turbo-related faults

problems.recommendation: On GT-Line or Premier Edition Kadjars over 80k miles showing boost faults, a rebuilt engine with tested turbo assembly is more reliable than actuator-only repair. For isolated actuator failure under 70k miles, specialist replacement is cost-effective.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt R9M/H5Ht engine prices for your Renault Kadjar

problems.h4: Oil Consumption & Bottom-End Wear - Why High-Mileage Kadjar Engines Fail
problems.affectedModels: Renault Kadjar all variants 1.2 TCe/1.5-1.6 dCi (2015-2022, H5F/K9K/R9M)
problems.rootCause: Piston ring wear and valve seal degradation cause excessive oil consumption; unchecked, leads to bearing wear and potential seizure.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace piston rings, valve seals, gaskets; machine head if required
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if bottom end is healthy; requires thorough compression/leak-down testing first

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit fully rebuilt engine with new pistons, rings, bearings, seals; bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Most reliable solution for engines with confirmed bottom-end wear or high-mileage uncertainty

problems.recommendation: If your Kadjar is burning over 1L oil per 1,000 miles or showing low compression, a rebuilt engine is the only reliable long-term fix. Top-end rebuilds are only viable with confirmed healthy bottom end and professional assessment.
problems.cta: Find a reconditioned Renault Kadjar engine with 12‑month warranty

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Renault Kadjar
finalCta.paragraph: The problems above represent the most common failure patterns driving Renault Kadjar engine replacement enquiries across the UK. EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Renault Kadjar specialists who supply rebuilt, reconditioned and used engines with upgraded components addressing original failure points. Every engine includes a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty and nationwide delivery options. Compare prices today and get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Renault Kadjar Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Renault Kadjar and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineSizes.h2: Renault Kadjar Engines by Size - Find the Right Displacement for Your Variant
engineSizes.intro: Every displacement fitted to the Renault Kadjar is listed below with compatible engine codes, production years and common failure notes to help you identify the correct replacement.

items.title: Renault Kadjar 1.5L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 1.5L dCi (K9K) is the backbone of the Kadjar diesel range, fitted to Play, Iconic and GT-Line variants from launch through 2022. This Cléon-derived unit prioritises fuel economy and low-end torque, making it the most common engine in UK Kadjar replacements.
commonFailurePoints: turbo actuator wear on higher-mileage units
items.cta: Get quotes for Renault Kadjar 1.5L diesel engines

items.title: Renault Kadjar 1.6L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 1.6L dCi (R9M) delivers higher output for GT-Line and Premier Edition models, with single or twin-turbo configurations. Introduced in 2016, this engine offers stronger performance but requires careful verification of turbo specification and transmission compatibility.
commonFailurePoints: flexplate wear on EDC automatic models
items.cta: Get quotes for Renault Kadjar 1.6L diesel engines

items.title: Renault Kadjar 1.2L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 1.2L TCe (H5F) powered pre-facelift petrol Kadjars from 2015-2018. While economical, early units are known for timing chain stretch; our rebuilt replacements include upgraded tensioner kits to address this documented weakness.
items.cta: Compare Renault Kadjar 1.2L petrol engine prices

items.title: Renault Kadjar 1.3L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 1.3L TCe (H5Ht), co-developed with Daimler, replaced the 1.2L in 2019 facelift models. This modern unit offers improved reliability, direct injection and better refinement, but requires verification of high-pressure fuel pump type and ECU compatibility.
items.cta: Compare Renault Kadjar 1.3L petrol engine prices

engineSizes.closing: Not sure which engine size your Renault Kadjar needs? items.descriptor: Diesel variants (1.5 dCi K9K, 1.6 dCi R9M) account for ~78% of UK Kadjar sales and dominate replacement enquiries due to high-mileage fleet and private hire use.
items.familiesLabel: Common Renault Kadjar Diesel Engine Families
families: K9K 1.5 dCi - most common replacement engine (Play/Iconic/GT-Line), EGR/DPF maintenance critical
R9M 1.6 dCi - higher output for GT-Line/Premier, verify single vs twin-turbo specification

foundIn: First generation Kadjar (2015-2022) - K9K 1.5 dCi, R9M 1.6 dCi
Facelift models (2019-2022) - updated K9K740, R9M420 with revised emissions hardware
knownFor: Strong motorway fuel economy and low-end torque for loaded family use
EGR/DPF clogging on short-journey cars exceeding 80k miles
High UK replacement demand on Iconic and GT-Line diesel variants
Turbo actuator wear on high-output R9M416 twin-turbo units

items.descriptor: Petrol variants (1.2 TCe H5F pre-2019, 1.3 TCe H5Ht 2019+) offer lower upfront cost but require careful verification of timing chain history and turbo specification.

items.descriptor: The Renault Kadjar was not offered with hybrid, plug-in hybrid or electric powertrains in the UK market during its 2015-2022 production run.

importantNotes: No mild hybrid (MHEV), plug-in hybrid (PHEV) or full hybrid (HEV) variants were sold in the UK

engineYears.h2: Renault Kadjar Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Renault Kadjar's 2015-2022 UK production timeline, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt engine prices from UK specialists.

years.preview: Launch Year: H5F Petrol & K9K Diesel Debut
years.description: The Kadjar launched with the H5F 1.2 TCe petrol and K9K 1.5 dCi diesel, establishing the core engine lineup for early UK models.
keyChanges: Renault Kadjar enters UK market with Play and Iconic trim levels
H5F 1.2 TCe petrol and K9K 1.5 dCi diesel offered from launch
Euro 5 emissions compliance on initial production batches
knownFor: H5F timing chain stretch emerges as key concern from 60k miles
K9K proves robust but requires regular EGR maintenance
Strong residual values drive high-mileage private hire adoption

years.description: Euro 6 compliance brings updated K9K732 diesel and the new R9M 1.6 dCi for higher-output variants.
keyChanges: Introduction of Euro 6-compliant K9K732 with AdBlue compatibility
R9M 1.6 dCi debuts for Iconic and GT-Line, offering 130hp output
GT-Line trim added to range with sportier specification
mainEngines: K9K732 - 1.5L diesel dCi Euro 6 (Play / Iconic / GT-Line)

AdBlue system faults emerge on post-2016 diesel Kadjars
H5F timing chain issues continue to drive replacement enquiries

years.description: Revised EGR cooler design on diesel engines and updated timing components on H5F address early failure points.

H5F402 introduced with updated timing chain guides for improved reliability
4Control AWD variant launched with R9M420 engine code

H5F402 offers marginal reliability improvement over H5F400
R9M416 twin-turbo 160hp variant introduced for flagship models

S-Edition trim added with exclusive specification

faq.h2: Renault Kadjar Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Renault Kadjar engine replacement cost in the UK?
items.answer: Used Renault Kadjar engines typically cost £650-£1,100, while reconditioned units range from £1,450-£3,100 depending on engine code and variant. Supply & fit labour adds £450-£850.
keyPoints: K9K 1.5 dCi rebuilt: £1,450-£2,250 supply only
R9M 1.6 dCi rebuilt: £1,850-£2,850 supply only
H5Ht 1.3 TCe rebuilt: £1,950-£3,100 supply only
All prices include 12-month unlimited mileage warranty
items.cta: Compare Renault Kadjar engine replacement prices now

items.question: What engine codes fit my Renault Kadjar?
items.answer: UK Kadjar models use K9K 1.5 dCi (most common), R9M 1.6 dCi (GT-Line/Premier), H5F 1.2 TCe (pre-2019 petrol), or H5Ht 1.3 TCe (2019+ petrol).
keyPoints: Verify code via V5C, engine bay stamping, or our free checker
K9K/R9M diesel codes are cross-compatible with Nissan Qashqai
H5F and H5Ht petrol engines are NOT interchangeable
EDC automatic variants require specific flexplate compatibility
items.cta: Use our Renault Kadjar engine code lookup tool

items.question: Can I fit a 1.6 dCi engine in my 1.5 dCi Renault Kadjar?
items.answer: Physically possible but requires ECU reprogramming, exhaust modification, and transmission compatibility checks - not recommended without specialist assessment.
keyPoints: Mounting points are similar but not identical across K9K/R9M
ECU coding and immobiliser reset mandatory post-installation
Turbo specification and intercooler piping may differ
Potential MoT emissions compliance issues if not properly coded
items.cta: Speak to a Renault Kadjar engine specialist before upgrading

items.question: How long does a Renault Kadjar engine replacement take?
items.answer: Engine dispatch takes 2-4 days for common K9K codes or 5-7 days for R9M/H5Ht. Fitting at a specialist garage takes 1-2 days including ECU coding.
keyPoints: Total turnaround typically 3-9 days from order to collection
EDC automatic models may require additional transmission calibration time
Supply & fit bookings can be scheduled in advance to minimise downtime
Road test and handover documentation included with specialist fitting
items.cta: Find a Renault Kadjar supply & fit specialist near you

items.question: Do you supply Renault Kadjar engines with fitting?
items.answer: Yes, we partner with UK-wide Renault and diesel specialists. Enter your postcode to find your nearest approved fitter with Kadjar experience and ECU coding capability.
keyPoints: All supply & fit orders include ECU coding and immobiliser reset
Fitting cost typically £450-£850 depending on location and transmission
Single-point warranty available covering both engine and labour
Nationwide network ensures coverage across mainland UK
items.cta: Get quotes for Renault Kadjar engine supply & fit

items.question: What warranty comes with a Renault Kadjar replacement engine?
items.answer: 12-month unlimited mileage warranty on reconditioned and rebuilt engines. Used engines typically carry 3-month warranty. Full terms and claim process provided pre-purchase.
keyPoints: Warranty valid only when correct engine code is supplied
Incorrect code selection voids cover and may cause fitment issues
Warranty covers parts and labour for manufacturing defects
Claim process managed via EngineMarket support team
items.cta: View Renault Kadjar engine warranty terms and conditions

items.question: How do I know which Renault Kadjar engine I need?
items.answer: Check your V5C registration document, locate the engine bay stamping near the oil filter, or use our free compatibility checker with your reg or VIN number.
keyPoints: Engine code stamped on block side or cylinder head
V5C Section D.2 lists engine capacity and fuel type
Our checker cross-references DVLA data for instant verification
Send engine photos to our specialists for free confirmation
items.cta: Identify your Renault Kadjar engine code instantly

items.question: Are Renault Kadjar engines compatible with Nissan Qashqai?
items.answer: Yes, Kadjar shares the CMF-CD platform with Nissan Qashqai; many K9K/R9M/H5Ht codes are cross-compatible but require verification of mounting points and ECU.
keyPoints: K9K 1.5 dCi and R9M 1.6 dCi codes often shared between models
Verify EGR/DPF hardware matches your Kadjar's emissions specification
ECU coding required even for physically compatible donor engines
Our compatibility checker confirms cross-model fitment
items.cta: Check Renault Kadjar Qashqai engine interchange compatibility

items.question: Can I return a Renault Kadjar engine if it doesn't fit?
items.answer: Yes, 14-day return window if engine doesn't fit due to our compatibility error. Customer errors subject to 15% restock fee plus return shipping.
keyPoints: Always verify engine code before ordering to avoid returns
Keep original packaging intact until fitment confirmed
Return shipping arranged via EngineMarket support team
Compatibility guarantee covers verified code mismatches
items.cta: Review Renault Kadjar engine return policy details

items.question: Do you offer finance for Renault Kadjar engine replacements?
items.answer: 0% finance available on rebuilt engines over £2,000. Apply in 90 seconds during checkout - instant decision with no impact to credit score for quotation.
keyPoints: Finance subject to status and eligibility checks
Typical terms: 12-24 months, 0% APR on qualifying orders
No early repayment penalties on approved agreements
Finance option displayed at checkout if order value qualifies
